name: V1 to V2 migration path - wrapped V1 tokens
description: Tests transfer path for a V1 user (hasV1=true) sending to a V2 group. V1 tokens must be wrapped before they can flow through V2 trust paths. Validates the pathfinder correctly handles V1→V2 bridging via wrapped tokens.
notes: Source 0x26994472... is a V1 user. Sink is the largest V2 group (1,552+ members). Tests V1/V2 token bridging through wrapped tokens. Part of future work for comprehensive V1→V2 migration testing.
